'''hapudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvala|uvala]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvala|uvala]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hapudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpidhith|hæpidhith]] || [[word:hæpidhij|hæpidhij]] || [[word:hæpidhish|hæpidhish]] || [[word:hæpidhi|hæpidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapupudhuth|hapupudhuth]] || [[word:hapupudhuj|hapupudhuj]] || [[word:hapupudhush|hapupudhush]] || [[word:hapupudhu|hapupudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapudhuth|hapudhuth]] || [[word:hapudhuj|hapudhuj]] || [[word:hapudhush|hapudhush]] || [[word:hapudhu|hapudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapufdhuth|hapufdhuth]] || [[word:hapufdhuj|hapufdhuj]] || [[word:hapufdhush|hapufdhush]] || [[word:hapufdhuf|hapufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapudhuthu|hapudhuthu]] || [[word:hapudhuju|hapudhuju]] || [[word:hapudhushu|hapudhushu]] || [[word:hapudhuku|hapudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapudhuth|hapudhuth]] || [[word:hapudhuj|hapudhuj]] || [[word:hapudhush|hapudhush]] || [[word:hapudhu|hapudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapudhuthul|hapudhuthul]] || [[word:hapudhujul|hapudhujul]] || [[word:hapudhushul|hapudhushul]] || [[word:hapudhukul|hapudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapudhuthuthu|hapudhuthuthu]] || [[word:hapudhujuju|hapudhujuju]] || [[word:hapudhushushu|hapudhushushu]] || [[word:hapudhuku|hapudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapudhuthun|hapudhuthun]] || [[word:hapudhujun|hapudhujun]] || [[word:hapudhushun|hapudhushun]] || [[word:hapudhukun|hapudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapudhuthuoro|hapudhuthuoro]] || [[word:hapudhujuoro|hapudhujuoro]] || [[word:hapudhushuoro|hapudhushuoro]] || [[word:hapudhukuoro|hapudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
